About

Every space is
constructed,
not assembled.

Studio Loom designs interiors at the intersection of modern structure and Indian craft sensibility. We work with residential and commercial clients across Delhi NCR, bringing precision, material intelligence, and unhurried process to every project.

01
Process over product

Every project takes time, precision, and layering. No copy-paste Pinterest interiors.

02
Interconnected systems

Architecture, furniture, lighting, and user behaviour are interdependent, nothing is isolated.

03
Rhythm & repetition

Calm, structured spaces built through spatial rhythm, columns, panels, material continuity.

04
Quiet luxury

Understated. Intelligent. Crafted. Not flashy, precise.

What We Do

Built for every scale of living.

From a single room to a complete commercial build-out, Studio Loom brings the same rigour and craft sensibility to every scale of project.

01
Residential
Interiors

Homes that carry the soul of their owners. We design around how you live, not how a showroom looks.

02
Commercial
Spaces

Workspaces, hospitality, and retail built with intention. Environments that perform and endure.

03
Turnkey
Projects

End-to-end delivery from concept to completion. We manage every detail so you don't have to.

04
Design
Consultation

A focused engagement for projects at any stage, direction, problem-solving, material curation.

05
Sourcing &
Procurement

Access to artisanal makers, regional craftspeople, and curated materials not available elsewhere.

06
Spatial
Planning

Layout, proportion, flow, and light, the foundational layer that every great interior is built on.

Selected Work

Our portfolio.

How We Work

Our process.

01
Discovery
Listen & understand

We begin by understanding how you live, work, and move, before a single line is drawn.

02
Concept
Direction & language

Spatial strategy, mood, material direction, and the design language that will carry the project.

03
Design
Develop & detail

Full drawings, sourcing, and coordination, every detail resolved before site begins.

04
Delivery
Build & complete

On-site supervision and final styling, we stay present until the space is exactly right.
